scripture.text: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight.

steps.write_prompt: Rewrite this verse in your own words.
steps.observation_prompt: What stands out to you in this passage? What is God saying here?
steps.reflection_prompt: Where in your life do you need to trust God more right now?
steps.do_prompt: What is one action you can take today to trust God in a practical way?

scripture.text: My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.

steps.write_prompt: Write this verse in a way that feels personal to you.
steps.observation_prompt: What does this verse teach about weakness and strength?
steps.reflection_prompt: What weakness are you currently facing, and how could God use it?
steps.do_prompt: What is one step you can take today to rely on God instead of your own strength?

scripture.text: Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.

steps.write_prompt: Rewrite this verse focusing on what it means to you personally.
steps.observation_prompt: What instructions are given in this passage?
steps.reflection_prompt: What is causing you anxiety right now?
steps.do_prompt: What is one specific prayer or action you can take today to release that anxiety to God?
